creator: brian@collab.net
text:
I'm seeing this to.  I think it's because of this in the Makefile:

# Workaround: pdf.patch and mp-tiff-patch must be fetched from my own site.
#             These are modified for applying after jp-extension-patch.

I think "my own site" refers to
ftp://ftp.airlab.cs.ritsumei.ac.jp/pub/X/xv-jp-extension/working/, and
ftp.airlab.cs.ritsumei.ac.jp is unresolvable (at least to my DNS).
However, commenting out those patches does not solve the problem; now,
xv-png-1.2d.patch fails to patch, even with offset.
